author: Daniel Biehl
title: Looking for artist for simple black sketch profile picture
content: Hey, i think this is the savest group to ask, and here are a lot of people that can propably help me. I need a profile picture for insta, very simple black sketch on white background. ... Of course with payment. The picture is for an instagram account where i load up some fun little shortstorys.

author: Apple
title: Looking for Artist - Large Work Order
content: This is a Paid Gig... looking for a 2d or 3d artist... For each ref I need a neutral pose... 7 characters... dm me for further details.
